age_limit.details: Age relaxation will be applicable as per the rules. Please refer to the official notification for specific details.

qualification.education_qualification: Recognised Degree with Post Graduate Degree/MBA, Post Graduate Degree in Environmental Science/Engineering/Law, B.E/B.Tech in Computer Science/IT, Degree in Law
qualification.details: Chief Manager (Business Development) / Senior Manager (Business Development) / Manager (Business Development): Any recognised Degree with Post Graduate Degree/MBA/equivalent qualification from a recognised National/International University. Chief Manager (Environment) / Manager (Environment): A post graduate degree in Environmental Science/Environmental Engineering or Environmental law from a recognized National/International University. Manager (ICT): First Class Graduate in B.E/B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering/Information Technology/specialisation in relevant field of IT from a recognised University/Institution. Chief Manager (Corporate Legal) / Manager (Corporate Legal): Degree in Law from a recognized National/International University.

salary_details.details: Chief Manager (Business Development): Rs. 2,00,000/- Per Month Senior Manager (Business Development): Rs. 1,60,000/- Per Month Manager (Business Development): Rs. 1,20,000/- Per Month Chief Manager (Environment): Rs. 2,00,000/- Per Month Manager (Environment): Rs. 1,20,000/- Per Month Manager (ICT): Rs. 1,20,000/- Per Month Chief Manager (Corporate Legal): Rs. 2,00,000/- Per Month Manager (Corporate Legal): Rs. 1,20,000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Mumbai Port Authority Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.mumbaiport.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mumbai Port Authority recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Mumbai Port Authority Various Contractual Managerial Positions is 06-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for Various Contractual Managerial Positions in the Mumbai Port Authority.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the managerial positions?
faq.answer: The salary for these positions ranges from Rs. 1,20,000 to Rs. 2,00,000 Per Month, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifications include a recognised Degree with a Post Graduate Degree/MBA, or specific degrees in Environmental Science/Engineering/Law, or B.E/B.Tech in Computer Science/IT, or a Degree in Law, as per the post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves Shortlisting, followed by an Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Mumbai Port Authority located?
faq.answer: The Mumbai Port Authority is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with a pincode of 400001.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Mumbai Port Authority?
faq.answer: The official website of Mumbai Port Authority is www.mumbaiport.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations provided?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly detail age relaxations. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any age relaxation rules.
